u.a: aft picks up a box of lemon
refers to the pudding in the bag
aft clinician opens it and hands it to Denise
as Denise pours the pudding in a bowl
a rubberband is tightly around a bag .
aft pulls out a small paper cup
starts to put pudding in the cup
wants to put it in a bigger cup
<1w> aI nin 6 wOn mOr stup der
hands clinician the cup of pudding
aft points to all the pudding

CHAT.comment: looking at pictures in a Richard Scarry book

u.a: referring to eggs flying across room
refers to food still on his plate
aft Denise looks at next picture
from under the covers of a bed
refers to a girl outside of the bed
aft looks at a picture of a vacuum cleaner sucking up a rug and starts laughing hysterically
<1w> hi dAn6 w&n6 i lai d&t
aft points to a cupboard full of food
<1w> lUk hi rid 6m 6 bUk &n de l& l&s it sOri
a door is open in the picture
<1w> de de dIdnt sAt dIs dOr
<1w> ti 6 dodo do In 6 k&r no do pIkoz
<2w-10w> d&t pIk6 pIkoz &n d&t pIk6 tiz tSiz
